Accesorios de belleza

Cypress Leaf Necklace – Gold Plated Sterling Silver Pendant | Nature

96.34 €

The cypress leaf necklace is a stunning gold plated sterling silver pendant designed to bring the beauty of nature into your everyday style. This nature inspired gift features a delicate vein design that captures the unique shape and intricate details of a real cypress leaf, symbolizing hope, immortality, and elevation. Handmade with care from recycled silver jewelry, this artisan crafted necklace blends sustainable jewelry gift practices with timeless elegance.

- Crafted from recycled sterling silver 925 and finished with durable gold plating that resists tarnish for lasting shine
- Features a delicate vein design preserving the natural beauty of the cypress leaf in every leaf pendant necklace
- Measures perfectly to fit comfortably as a pendant necklace, ideal for layering or wearing solo
- Handmade gold necklace created using rare techniques perfected over years to merge nature art necklace qualities with wearable jewelry
- Eco friendly jewelry made sustainably since 2011 in Athens by MNJRealFlowerJewelry
- Each piece arrives beautifully gift boxed, ready as a nature inspired gift for loved ones or special keepsakes
- Free worldwide shipping available; contact us for exclusive distributors in your area
- Mother Nature Jewellery donates 1 € from every sale to Lalibela, supporting children in need through education and care

This symbolic leaf jewelry is more than just an accessory—it is a meaningful statement of sustainability and artistry. The polished gold plated necklace offers both elegance and durability, while the recycled silver pendant supports eco friendly jewelry values. Wearing this cypress leaf necklace connects you to nature’s timeless inspiration and contributes to positive change.

Choose this sustainable jewelry gift to enjoy a handmade gold necklace that honors the environment and craftsmanship. Its unique design makes it perfect for those who appreciate delicate vein design details and artisan crafted necklaces. Whether for yourself or as a thoughtful nature inspired gift, this cypress leaf necklace combines beauty, symbolism, and eco-consciousness in one exquisite piece.

Envío 24/48h garantizado
Producto 100% Original

* Los precios incluyen IVA. Gastos de envío calculados en el checkout.

Descripción detallada

The cypress leaf necklace is a stunning gold plated sterling silver pendant designed to bring the beauty of nature into your everyday style. This nature inspired gift features a delicate vein design that captures the unique shape and intricate details of a real cypress leaf, symbolizing hope, immortality, and elevation. Handmade with care from recycled silver jewelry, this artisan crafted necklace blends sustainable jewelry gift practices with timeless elegance.

- Crafted from recycled sterling silver 925 and finished with durable gold plating that resists tarnish for lasting shine
- Features a delicate vein design preserving the natural beauty of the cypress leaf in every leaf pendant necklace
- Measures perfectly to fit comfortably as a pendant necklace, ideal for layering or wearing solo
- Handmade gold necklace created using rare techniques perfected over years to merge nature art necklace qualities with wearable jewelry
- Eco friendly jewelry made sustainably since 2011 in Athens by MNJRealFlowerJewelry
- Each piece arrives beautifully gift boxed, ready as a nature inspired gift for loved ones or special keepsakes
- Free worldwide shipping available; contact us for exclusive distributors in your area
- Mother Nature Jewellery donates 1 € from every sale to Lalibela, supporting children in need through education and care

This symbolic leaf jewelry is more than just an accessory—it is a meaningful statement of sustainability and artistry. The polished gold plated necklace offers both elegance and durability, while the recycled silver pendant supports eco friendly jewelry values. Wearing this cypress leaf necklace connects you to nature’s timeless inspiration and contributes to positive change.

Choose this sustainable jewelry gift to enjoy a handmade gold necklace that honors the environment and craftsmanship. Its unique design makes it perfect for those who appreciate delicate vein design details and artisan crafted necklaces. Whether for yourself or as a thoughtful nature inspired gift, this cypress leaf necklace combines beauty, symbolism, and eco-consciousness in one exquisite piece.
